response.justification: Bogdan Szabo brings 17+ years of broad full-stack and backend engineering experience, including high-throughput distributed systems work at Dunnhumby (millions of HTTP requests/sec) and a consistent software craftsmanship discipline. However, the Principal SWE — Growth/Experimentation role is tightly scoped around experimentation frameworks, A/B testing platforms, feature flagging, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, and growth measurement systems — none of which appear anywhere in the resume. There is also no evidence of IC6-level cross-team platform ownership, statistical methods for experiment analysis, or rollout-risk management, which are the core competencies this role demands.
strengths: High-throughput distributed systems experience at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests/sec with low-latency, async I/O design
Strong software craftsmanship discipline demonstrated through TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and open-source testing framework authorship
Broad language proficiency (TypeScript, C/C++, C#, Java, D) satisfying the technical language requirements
concerns: Zero experimentation platform, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout-risk management experience present in the resume
No telemetry or metrics infrastructure work and no mention of statistical methods or data analysis for growth measurement
Career level is Senior/Staff, not Principal; no evidence of IC6-scope cross-team architectural ownership or stakeholder alignment at enterprise scale

key_factors.factor: No experimentation or growth platform experience
No telemetry, metrics, or statistical analysis background
High-throughput distributed systems experience at Dunnhumby
